entries.title: ON THE FIRST BOOK OF KINGS 14:1 on first-kings 14:2
entries.excerpt: "At that time Abijah son of Jeroboam fell sick," and [the king], being worried for the health of his son, sent his wife to the prophet Ahijah because he was confident that through the prayers of that holy man he would obtain from God, whom he had repudiated, the healing of his son.
